title: Hederella longistylis
intro: I couldn't find any information about Hederella longistylis.
taxonomy: Hederella longistylis belongs to the phylum Rotifera, class Eurotatoria, order Monogononta, and family Habrotrochidae. It is a species of rotifer, a type of microscopic aquatic animal. Rotifers are characterized by their ciliated locomotory structures and are often found in freshwater environments. They are an important part of aquatic food chains, serving as both predators and prey for other organisms. Hederella longistylis is just one of many species within the Habrotrochidae family, which is composed of various rotifer species.
